subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the divine Lote-Tree upon the precincts of Paradise hath in truth been witnessed, and shall soon burst forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من سدره القدس علی بقعه الفردوس قد کان علی الحق مشهودا فسوف ینفطر
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @apocalyptic imagery, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
